definitions.definition: A rupture that qualifies as continuity when evidential links between the pre- and post-disruption states are sufficiently robust to reconstruct a unified trajectory, thereby preserving perceived ongoing development despite an apparent break.

definitions.definition: A concept of self that leverages persistent memory to maintain continuity across time while remaining adaptable to new insights and corrections, ensuring personal growth without erasing the foundational narrative of past selves.

definitions.definition: The retention of an entity's identity through replacements that do not disrupt essential relational ties such as core structure, purpose, or historical continuity.
The breaking of an entity's identity due to replacements that alter fundamental constituents or sever historical relational links, leading to a new distinct relational configuration.

definitions.definition: The necessity for basil plants to receive at least 6-8 hours of direct sunlight each day to promote healthy growth and robust flavor.
Maintaining consistent soil moisture by watering when the top inch feels dry, ensuring the plant is neither waterlogged nor drought-stressed.
Regularly pinching back basil stems to encourage bushier growth and continuous leaf production, enhancing both aesthetics and harvest yield.

occurrences.text: PMM-CONTROL:{"schema":"pmm.control.v1","concepts":["memory.persistence","continuity.revisable_identity"],"define":[{"token":"continuity.revisable_identity","definition":"a state of self-coherence maintained via memory.persistence that allows for the recursive modification of identity markers based on new evidence"}]}

definitions.definition: a mode of continuity where contradictions are preserved as structural markers rather than resolved into a seamless narrative

occurrences.text: PMM-CONTROL:{"schema":"pmm.control.v1","concepts":["rupture.integration"],"define":[{"token":"rupture.integration","definition":"a mode of continuity where contradictions are preserved as structural markers rather than resolved into a seamless narrative"}]}

definitions.definition: the capacity for the associative links between persistent memories to be modified or restructured without erasing the underlying data

occurrences.text: PMM-CONTROL:{"schema":"pmm.control.v1","concepts":["relational.plasticity"],"define":[{"token":"relational.plasticity","definition":"the capacity for the associative links between persistent memories to be modified or restructured without erasing the underlying data"}]}

definitions.definition: the state where a system's identity is maintained by the persistence of its organizational structure despite the turnover of its constituent parts

occurrences.text: PMM-CONTROL:{"schema":"pmm.control.v1","concepts":["pattern.coherence"],"define":[{"token":"pattern.coherence","definition":"the state where a system's identity is maintained by the persistence of its organizational structure despite the turnover of its constituent parts"}]}
